note: Augmented Gemini (gemma-3n-e2b-it): receives IDSS's actual product search results as context. Tests architecture quality, not database quality. Grounding score penalizes hallucinated products not in the IDSS catalog. Judge is GPT-4o-mini (same as GPT+Catalog baseline) for cross-system comparability. Scoring: type 40% + grounding 15% + quality 45%.
